subcodes.first_line: O thou disordered one! How blissful wert thou when thou wert guided by the light of divine guidance and didst follow the company of the chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بی سر و سامان چه خوشوقت بودی که بنور هدی مهتدی گشتی و بحزب اصفیا مقتفی
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
